Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen

package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.testgen
This package contains the graphical user interface of the test generation backend. It uses the KeYGuiExtension api.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    de.uka.ilkd.key.gui
    This package contains classes forming the graphical user interface of KeY.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CounterExampleAction
     
    CounterExampleAction.NoMainWindowCounterExampleGenerator
    Performs the SemanticsBlastingMacro in a side proof hidden to the user and shows the result with help of the SolverListener.
    TestGenerationAction
    Action which generates test cases for all open nodes.
    TestgenExtension
     
    TestgenOptionsPanel
     
    TGInfoDialog
     
    TGWorker
    The worker must be started using method TGWorker.start() and not via the standard SwingWorker.execute().
